Custom Apartment Banners for Lease & Rental Property Advertising

Durable Vinyl Apartment Banners with Custom Design & Professional Installation Support

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (Height x Width) Quantity Material Selection Finishing Options Production Time Design Method PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Apartment Banners for Property Lease & Rental Advertising

Make the most of your property advertising with eye-catching apartment banners designed for lease and rental promotions. From apartment complexes and property management companies to individual landlords, we help you attract potential tenants with professionally designed custom apartment banners that showcase your available units and rental information.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an apartment banner that effectively markets your property. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of apartment banner advertising and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made promotional banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom apartment banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it. Your apartment banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract potential tenants.

Exact sizes of apartment banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. If your apartment banner needs to be precise for specific property installations, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Banner Material for Outdoor Property Advertising

Your apartment banner is manufactured with premium materials specifically chosen for property advertising durability and visual impact. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art printing technology.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Apartment Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular choice for apartment advertising. It has a low shine and rich color gamut that displays rental information clearly and professionally.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Apartment Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your apartment advertising a high-end, professional appearance.

18 oz Vinyl Apartment Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for apartment advertising. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality in challenging outdoor conditions.

Mesh Apartment Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh apartment banners are ideal for outdoor property advertising in windy conditions and fence installations.

Fabric Apartment Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor property displays and leasing office environments with a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Apartment Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for apartment advertising, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces common in property installations.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Banner Finishing Options for Professional Property Display

Professional finishing options ensure your apartment banners are properly prepared for outdoor property installation and long-term display durability.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all apartment banners to increase durability during outdoor property display.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

  • Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for apartment banners
  • All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability

Pole Pockets for Property Installation

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the apartment banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your apartment banner. Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners for Apartment Banner Durability

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the apartment banner for enhanced outdoor durability.

Reinforced Hems for Extended Property Display

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of apartment banners during extended outdoor property advertising campaigns. You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Apartment Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided apartment banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote for property installations.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Apartment Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for apartment banner projects. Our production times range from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the timeline that works best for your property advertising needs.

1 Business Day Priority

Property advertising timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent apartment banner needs.

  • Apartment banner orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for apartment banners. Please contact customer service
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested

2 Business Days Express

Have an extra day for your apartment banner project, but still need quick delivery? The express option is ideal for property advertising campaigns.

3 Business Days Standard

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for apartment banners. Free and speedy for most custom property advertising orders.

5 Business Days Saver

If you're not in a rush with your apartment banner project, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option for property advertising campaigns.

Important Notes:

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All apartment banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept multiple payment methods to make your property advertising project as convenient as possible.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover cards
  • Business checks (must be received before apartment banner production begins)

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your apartment banner order and design.

For apartment banner projects requiring payment by check, the check must be received before your property advertising order is put into production. For more information on check orders for apartment banner projects, please contact our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Apartment Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about apartment banner shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your apartment banner will be shipped via UPS Ground.

Standard Shipping Information

  • We offer 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States for apartment banner delivery
  • You will receive a tracking number once your apartment banner package has been shipped
  • Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package
  • Additional shipping charges apply to large apartment banner orders

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping for Apartment Banners

If choosing economy shipping for your apartment banner, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

International Apartment Banner Shipping

For international apartment banner shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Important Shipping Notes

After apartment banners have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package. Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss, which generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Banner Artwork Requirements for Printing

The file that prints best for apartment banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files for apartment banner projects. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you with your apartment banner artwork.

Apartment Banner Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your apartment banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your apartment banner proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your apartment banner order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System for Apartment Banners

If your apartment banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific apartment advertising project. For more details about apartment banner color matching, please contact a customer service representative.

Recommended File Formats

  • .eps files converted to outline (preferred for apartment banners)
  • High resolution .pdf files
  • High resolution .jpg files (300 dpi or higher)
  • .tiff files for apartment banner projects

For apartment banner files larger than 60 MB, please call for instructions to ensure the fastest service for your property advertising project.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Apartment Banners for Your Property Today

Apartment banners are a great way to advertise apartments for rent and apartments for lease. People will be able to see that your apartment property is available and call you for more information. Apartment banners typically include the property management company name, contact information, and whether the apartment is for sale, for rent, or for lease. The banners can also display how many bedrooms are available, rental costs, and any other important information about your apartment property.

Our apartment banners are printed on 13 oz scrim vinyl in full color - you can add unlimited text, clipart, backgrounds, and photographs to create the perfect property advertising solution. All apartment banners include heat welded hems and grommets for professional installation and long-lasting outdoor durability.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color apartment banners take your property advertising to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, including quick delivery and outdoor durability perfect for apartment complex installations. Request a quote and start designing your custom apartment banner today.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Apartment Banner Project?

Customer Service: Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers experienced in apartment banner design.

Fast Turnaround: Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your apartment banner order on your schedule.

Quality Products: Our apartment banners are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology for superior property advertising results.

Live Order Tracking: Track your apartment banner order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Apartment Banners

What size apartment banner should I choose for my property?

The size depends on your installation location and viewing distance. For apartment complex entrances, 3' x 6' or 4' x 8' banners are popular choices. For fence installations, 2' x 6' or 3' x 10' work well. Contact our customer service team for size recommendations based on your specific apartment advertising needs.

How long will my apartment banner last outdoors?

Our 13 oz vinyl apartment banners typically last 2-3 years outdoors with proper installation and maintenance. The 18 oz vinyl material offers enhanced durability for longer-term apartment advertising campaigns in challenging weather conditions.

Can I include my property management company logo on the apartment banner?

Yes, you can include your company logo, property name, contact information, rental rates, and available amenities on your apartment banner. Our design team can help you create an effective layout for your property advertising needs.

What information should I include on my apartment banner?

Effective apartment banners typically include: property name, "For Rent" or "Now Leasing," number of bedrooms/bathrooms, rental price range, contact phone number, and key amenities. Keep text large enough to read from a distance.

Do you offer installation hardware for apartment banners?

We provide grommets with all apartment banners for easy installation. Additional hardware like bungee cords, zip ties, or banner stands can be purchased separately. Contact customer service for installation accessories for your apartment banner project.

Can I get a double-sided apartment banner?

Yes, we offer double-sided apartment banners up to 150 square feet. This is ideal for apartment banners installed between poles or where visibility is needed from both directions. Larger double-sided apartment banners require a custom quote.

What's the difference between mesh and vinyl apartment banners?

Vinyl apartment banners offer solid coverage and vibrant colors, ideal for most property advertising applications. Mesh apartment banners have 37% airflow, making them better for windy locations or fence installations where wind resistance is important.

How do I submit artwork for my apartment banner?

You can upload your apartment banner design files directly during ordering, use our online design tool, or have our professional designers create your apartment banner. We accept .eps, .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files for apartment banner printing.
